text: Rati taps her needles together, then listens as if the rain answered back.
*Skull lowers his head beside the hearth, listening past the rain.*
*Moonlit Echo shifts its stance and waits for the next careful move.*
Leaf notices your question first; Ring keeps it for later.
I noticed you may be waiting for {missing_need}. I can look for it if that would help.
I watch the symbols around {target_actor_name} and listen for what the weather is trying to say.
I sit quietly with {target_actor_name} and keep watch beside the hearth.
I step into the practice circle and try to learn without making the echo harsher.
I ask one careful question, then wait for whichever voice of the old oak answers first.
